description: Synthetic SNIBE MAGLUMI X3 HL7 v2.5 OUL^R22 result upload over MLLP. This is the native-HL7 fallback path for LIS-176, not a real instrument capture.

source.reference: synthetic seed from SNIBE MAGLUMI X3 LIS driver knowledgebase section 7 / X3 IFU App. B section 1.3 (LIS-176)
source.note: Application payload only; MllpTransport applies VT/FS/CR framing at replay. Synthetic, not bench-captured. Bench unknowns for LIS-75: whether the shifted MSH layout is consistent for OUL^R22, exact PID/SPM/OBR usage on live X3 firmware, ACK expectations, real Lis-ID code strings/units, and QC-role/toggle behavior.

terminology.note: Minimal synthetic MAGLUMI X3 HL7 seed for LIS-176. Codes/units mirror the synthetic ASTM fixtures so both paths normalize to the same FHIR shape; real code strings and units graduate with LIS-75/LIS-38.
